requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC及电能质量——光伏逆变器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC及電能品質——光伏逆變器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Maldives PV inverter projects commonly rely on IEC-aligned EMC and power-quality evidence rather than a clearly identified standalone Maldives PV inverter EMC certification route. For grid-tied inverters, project engineers may request IEC 62920 for PV power-conversion equipment EMC, IEC 61000-series immunity and emission evidence, and harmonic or flicker documentation suitable for small island grids. Because island grids have lower short-circuit capacity and less inertia than large interconnected grids, EMC and harmonic performance can be more visible to STELCO or FENAKA during project review and commissioning.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫光伏逆变器项目通常依赖IEC导向的EMC和电能质量证据，而非明确识别出的独立马尔代夫光伏逆变器EMC认证路径。对于并网逆变器，项目工程师可能要求IEC 62920光伏功率变换设备EMC、IEC 61000系列抗扰度和发射证据，以及适合小型岛屿电网的谐波或闪变文件。由于岛屿电网相比大型互联电网短路容量更低、惯量更小，EMC和谐波表现可能在STELCO或FENAKA项目审查和调试期间更受关注。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫光伏逆變器項目通常依賴IEC導向的EMC和電能品質證據，而非明確識別出的獨立馬爾地夫光伏逆變器EMC認證路徑。對於併網逆變器，項目工程師可能要求IEC 62920光伏功率轉換設備EMC、IEC 61000系列抗擾度和發射證據，以及適合小型島嶼電網的諧波或閃變文件。由於島嶼電網相比大型互聯電網短路容量更低、慣量更小，EMC和諧波表現可能在STELCO或FENAKA項目審查和調試期間更受關注。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, harmonic, and flicker standards as specified by the project
STELCO or FENAKA project-specific power-quality and commissioning requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408 and related China domestic EMC testing through CNAS-accredited laboratories. The test methods may overlap conceptually with IEC 61000-series methods, but the report scope, limits, laboratory accreditation context, language, and project acceptance route may not match Maldives tender or utility requirements. China-market EMC evidence is therefore useful but should not be presented as automatic IEC 62920 or Maldives utility compliance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408及相关中国国内EMC测试，并由CNAS认可实验室出具。测试方法在概念上可能与IEC 61000系列方法有重叠，但报告范围、限值、实验室认可背景、语言和项目接受路径可能不符合马尔代夫招标或公用事业要求。因此，中国市场EMC证据有参考价值，但不应作为IEC 62920或马尔代夫公用事业自动合规证据提交。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408及相關中國國內EMC測試，並由CNAS認可實驗室出具。測試方法在概念上可能與IEC 61000系列方法有重疊，但報告範圍、限值、實驗室認可背景、語言和項目接受路徑可能不符合馬爾地夫招標或公用事業要求。因此，中國市場EMC證據有參考價值，但不應作為IEC 62920或馬爾地夫公用事業自動合規證據提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
CNAS-accredited China EMC test reports for PV inverter models

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC reports may not satisfy a Maldives tender or utility request for IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series evidence. Exporters should confirm the required EMC report scope, applicable harmonic and flicker limits, language, laboratory-accreditation expectations, and whether retesting is needed for the 230/400 V, 50 Hz Maldives configuration. This is especially important for weak island grids and hybrid solar-plus-storage projects.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC报告可能不满足马尔代夫招标或公用事业单位对IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据的要求。出口商应确认所需EMC报告范围、适用谐波和闪变限值、语言、实验室认可预期，以及是否需要针对230/400 V、50 Hz马尔代夫配置重新测试。对于弱岛屿电网和光储混合项目，这一点尤其重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC報告可能不滿足馬爾地夫招標或公用事業單位對IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據的要求。出口商應確認所需EMC報告範圍、適用諧波和閃變限值、語言、實驗室認可預期，以及是否需要針對230/400 V、50 Hz馬爾地夫配置重新測試。對於弱島嶼電網和光儲混合項目，這一點尤其重要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by the tender, owner engineer, STELCO, FENAKA, or commissioning plan; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence is commonly expected for bankable grid-tied PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme driven in China; GB/T EMC evidence does not automatically satisfy Maldives project EMC requirements

source.publisher: Ministry of Climate Change, Environment and Energy, Republic of Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not submit China GB/T 37408 EMC evidence as a one-for-one substitute for IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence unless the Maldives tender or utility engineer expressly accepts it. Confirm harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emission requirements for the exact STELCO or FENAKA project and the 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非马尔代夫招标文件或公用事业工程师明确接受，否则不要将中国GB/T 37408 EMC证据作为IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据的一对一替代。应针对具体STELCO或FENAKA项目及230/400 V、50 Hz配置确认谐波、闪变、抗扰度和发射要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非馬爾地夫招標文件或公用事業工程師明確接受，否則不要將中國GB/T 37408 EMC證據作為IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據的一對一替代。應針對具體STELCO或FENAKA項目及230/400 V、50 Hz配置確認諧波、閃變、抗擾度和發射要求。
